attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT CG1_OE_ORDER_HOLDS_ALL.ORDER_HOLD_ID,
CG1_OE_ORDER_HOLDS_ALL.ATTRIBUTE1, 
CG1_OE_ORDER_HOLDS_ALL.ATTRIBUTE3, 
CG1_OE_ORDER_HOLDS_ALL.CREATION_DATE, 
CG1_OE_ORDER_HOLDS_ALL.HEADER_ID,
CG1_OE_ORDER_HOLDS_ALL.RELEASED_FLAG,
CG1_OE_ORDER_HOLDS_ALL.HOLD_RELEASE_ID, 
CG1_OE_ORDER_HOLDS_ALL.HOLD_SOURCE_ID, 
CG1_OE_ORDER_HOLDS_ALL.LINE_ID, 
CG1_OE_ORDER_HOLDS_ALL.ATTRIBUTE13,
CG1_OE_ORDER_HOLDS_ALL.ATTRIBUTE10,
CG1_OE_ORDER_HOLDS_ALL.ATTRIBUTE11,
CG1_OE_ORDER_HOLDS_ALL.ATTRIBUTE12,
CG1_OE_ORDER_HOLDS_ALL.ATTRIBUTE14, 
CG1_OE_ORDER_HOLDS_ALL.ATTRIBUTE15, 
CG1_OE_ORDER_HOLDS_ALL.ATTRIBUTE2, 
CG1_OE_ORDER_HOLDS_ALL.ATTRIBUTE4, 
CG1_OE_ORDER_HOLDS_ALL.ATTRIBUTE5, 
CG1_OE_ORDER_HOLDS_ALL.ATTRIBUTE6, 
CG1_OE_ORDER_HOLDS_ALL.ATTRIBUTE7, 
CG1_OE_ORDER_HOLDS_ALL.ATTRIBUTE8, 
CG1_OE_ORDER_HOLDS_ALL.ATTRIBUTE9, 
CG1_OE_ORDER_HOLDS_ALL.CONTEXT, 
CG1_OE_ORDER_HOLDS_ALL.CREATED_BY, 
CG1_OE_ORDER_HOLDS_ALL.LAST_UPDATED_BY, 
CG1_OE_ORDER_HOLDS_ALL.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, 
CG1_OE_ORDER_HOLDS_ALL.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, 
CG1_OE_ORDER_HOLDS_ALL.ORG_ID, 
CG1_OE_ORDER_HOLDS_ALL.PROGRAM_APPLICATION_ID, 
CG1_OE_ORDER_HOLDS_ALL.PROGRAM_ID,
CG1_OE_ORDER_HOLDS_ALL.PROGRAM_UPDATE_DATE,
CG1_OE_ORDER_HOLDS_ALL.REQUEST_ID,
CG1_OE_ORDER_HOLDS_ALL.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME,
CG1_OE_ORDER_HOLDS_ALL.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME,
CG1_OE_ORDER_HOLDS_ALL.SOURCE_DML_TYPE
FROM
$$NRTACCUMVWDB.CG1_OE_ORDER_HOLDS_ALL CG1_OE_ORDER_HOLDS_ALL,
$$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_OPERATING_UNIT NCOU
WHERE
CG1_OE_ORDER_HOLDS_ALL.ORG_ID = NCOU.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT
AND
NCOU.MOVED_TO_CG1_FLG  = 'Y'     
AND CG1_OE_ORDER_HOLDS_ALL.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >='$$LastExtractDate'
AND CG1_OE_ORDER_HOLDS_ALL.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME < '$$EndLastExtractDate'
/* Modified as part of Ops CR */
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY CG1_OE_ORDER_HOLDS_ALL.ORDER_HOLD_ID ORDER BY CG1_OE_ORDER_HOLDS_ALL.REFRESH_DATETIME DESC) = 1
